name: The Commander's Ghost
description: Voss is haunted by a village she failed to save years ago. Remnants of Rivendale may still exist on the Eastern Road.

DISCOVERED.journal_entry: Voss mentioned a village called Rivendale — a place she was supposed to defend but arrived too late. She's heard rumors that someone survived and lives on the Eastern Road.

ACTIVE.journal_entry: I'm heading to the Eastern Road to search for the ruins of Rivendale. Voss couldn't bring herself to come — she gave me her old company banner to show any survivors.
objectives: Search for the ruins of Rivendale

RIVENDALE_FOUND.journal_entry: I found what remains of Rivendale. The ruins are overgrown, but there are signs of recent habitation.
objectives: Determine the fate of the villagers

COMPLETED_SURVIVORS.journal_entry: Against all odds, seven villagers survived — hiding in the root cellars beneath the ruins for years. When I showed them Voss's banner, an old woman wept. 'She remembered us,' she said.

COMPLETED_GRAVES.journal_entry: Only graves. Thirty-two cairns in neat rows, each marked with a river stone. Someone buried them properly. Voss will want to know. I'm not sure I want to tell her.

COMPLETED_IRONMARCH.journal_entry: Ironmarch has occupied Rivendale. They're using the ruins as a forward camp. Voss was right to worry — and now she has a reason to fight.

COMPLETED_LETTER.journal_entry: I found a letter in the ruins, sealed with a military stamp. It's from Voss's old commander, Captain Aldric. He ordered the retreat from Rivendale — not Voss. She was following orders. The guilt she carries was never hers.
